title: Baked Spanish Fish with Xtra Cheese Ensaimada Crust
description: A delicious and satisfying Spanish-inspired dish featuring baked fish topped with a crispy ensaimada crust and melted xtra cheese. Perfect for a light and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Fresh Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish works, such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: Xtra Cheese
ingredients.notes: any extra-hard cheese works, such as manchego or parmesan

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the ensaimada bread cubes on the prepared baking sheet and brush with olive oil.
Season the fish fillets with salt and black pepper.
Place the fish fillets on top of the ensaimada bread cubes.
Sprinkle the shredded xtra cheese evenly over the fish fillets.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the ensaimada crust is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
